TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_pupuk, title = pupuk, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/pupuk} }

S.FORM: == pupuk == m_yan na cyux mngilis qu qwas na pupuk qasa. tehuk lhngan lga mhtuw pupuk la. siki mlhngan ga, mlata' qu pupuk hiya'.
== pupuk == m_yan na cyux mngilis qu qwas na pupuk qasa. tehuk lhngan lga mhtuw pupuk la. siki mlhngan ga, mlata' qu pupuk hiya'.
S.PHON: == pupuk == məjan na ʦ~ʨjux mŋilis~ɕ qu qwas~ɕ na pupuk qas~ɕa. teħuk lħŋan lɣa mħtuw pupuk la. s~ɕiki mlħŋan ɣa, mlataʔ qu pupuk ħijaʔ.
